title: Ametist Food - [1.0]
description: With this resource pack you can eat real amethysts in minecraft
body:
What does it add?

Replaces the texture of the golden carrot with the texture of the amethyst, the name of the item, the sounds of food with the sounds of the amethyst and changes the hunger scale + compatible with AppleSkin https://modrinth.com/project/EsAfCjCV

How does it work?

It's pretty simple
The text is replaced through the file ru_ru.json, en_us.json, the hunger is replaced in the folders appleskin and minecraft > textures > gui > sprites > hud

How did I come up with the idea of ​​​​literally chewing crystals?

We spent time with a friend on the server and he began to tell me that he chews amethysts and I found it funny and decided to dedicate a resource pack to this.

Wait for update 1.1, which will add a bunch of features with CIT resewn [https://modrinth.com/project/otVJckYQ](https://modrinth.com/project/otVJckYQ) to version 1.21.1 and 1.21.5
